item.title: Sticker is back up. And will stay
item.description: (See prior two posts for the back story). It was a disgruntled employee (who had no business being in the physicians locker room to begin) who was ripping off my stickers. Got word from the VP of the Operating Room Operations that my stickers are allowed and that she spoke to the individual. We will see if it’s still up tomorrow. If not, next step is a formal HR complaint for destruction of personal property, harassment, and view point discrimination (thank you Imgur lawyers for that last term). I’d like to avoid HR if she complied with the request, as I think getting her fired will only solidify her view as pro choice people as evil. And if she stays, I have 3 years here to meet her and chip away at her bigotry and miseducation. Let’s see what tomorrow brings. Thanks for having my back, imgurians ❤️ love from Dr Buttdaps aka Dr Davis.
item.dc:creator: ButtDaps

item.title: The Hunter Biden corruption continues

item.dc:creator: Churchofthesubgenius

item.title: No more bottom dysphoria for me!
item.description: FP Edit: oh my God. I can't believe the support and the comments. This community is beautiful and amazing. If I can quote the legendary Patton Oswalt: "it's chaos. Be kind" goodnight<3 I'll be 32 in a few weeks. I'll finally have my Vaginoplasty surgery tomorrow morning. Been training and preparing and getting in shape, hair removal, hormones, doctors, therapists, letters, rejections, insurance etc etc etc etc. it's a monumental undertaking. If anyone. EVER tells you they just hand these out and mutilate kids left and right they are unbelievably wrong. It takes months of prep, dozens of tests and tens of thousands of dollars and a lot of luck. See ya on the other side Imgur fam <3
item.dc:creator: SquiggleSquaggleSqwoo

item.title: It's an unhinged medium-sized Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
sounds like it
lemme get uhhh
yes
pretty sure it was Craig
Liev lookin good
must be talking about delicious chicken fingers
as is tradition
my dog has had the same food and treats for years bc of this
mmm hmm
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: You've got some..bottom shelf memes on your face.
item.description:
Psst. Here's an idea, Secret Santa. ;)
@SebastianCrab edit: Know your limits.
Maybe that's why he's such a fucking asshole.
@JKBenton I absolutely adore your work, and I sincerely apologize for disgracing your art, but....Magoo fit here so well.
Imgur's Secret Santa is HERE!! Don't give your money to Bezos this year. Instead, why don't we support our Imgur entrepreneurs? If you are a creator, you can promote your merchandise on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka in our # shameless-self-promos channel. (Please be sure to pick up the "Creator" role in onboarding) If you're not a creator, you are still invited to join to support our Imgurian artists! discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) and Taco Supreme With The Sour Cream Mustache tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: This reminds me - I have to find a therapist
item.description: Thanks to @shaows for the sauce on this... https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iq9jSEq0enw Garbage man's own statement: "This was an April fools joke for my bosses at work. I recorded the video from inside my own house with my own garbage can and mailbox. I took the video to work and asked one of our CSR's to give it to my boss and pretend that a customer came in super angry with it. Needless to say after watching the video I was called in to the office for what was to be my termination... Fortunately for me they took the prank very well." I still need to find a therapist for my own anger issues, LOL.
item.dc:creator: IamJACKSventedSPLEEN

item.title: The 361st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
For me it would be The Price Is Right, and I spin *that* wheel so hard it makes the studio go back in time and we get Bob Barker back at age 25 (with all the knowledge he had when he died at 99) for another 60+ years of TV hosting. With him would come back the good days of TV Game Shows, innocent and fun.
So apparently this doesn't work if you also describe what you're exactly like this.
▲ @CodyBurkett ▼
@ Everyone
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
▲ @PotatoCheesMonk ▼
@HileyNoteson
Lookin at you, Cucker Tarlson
This was the Vancouver Orpheum
Mood
Call a Bondulance
MY CABBAGES! I mean laundry!
Why, tho? Why airbrush it out?
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: "Why do Palestinians rebel?" Because they live in a concentration camp. These images aren't even from Gaza (which has been getting bombed for weeks now), this is the West Bank where there isn't even any threat of Hamas.
item.description: Second video is from 2018. This is their life during "peace time": https://www.facebook.com/MiddleEastEye/videos/palestinian-children-stopped-at-security-gate/1742907009108013/ If you wanna find ways to tell your representatives that you want a permanent ceasefire in Gaza follow the links provided here: https://ceasefiretoday.com/
item.dc:creator: todosselacomen

item.title: 12 Awesome and Useful Websites
item.description:
Listen to radio around the world https://radio.garden
Wondering where that plane, jet, or helicopter is going? (NOTE Don't buy anything on that site just use it for further info only) https://www.flightradar24.com/
This website has every single pc game from the 70's,80's,90's till the early 2000's. https://oldgamesdownload.com/
You can use it to "send emails to the future you". It helps put into perspective how much has changed over the course of a year https://www.futureme.org/
Show a list of popular products that are currently at their lowest price in the last year https://lp.deals
Gives free access to download almost any research paper https://sci-hub.mksa.top/
Is a far better option than old games download https://www.myabandonware.com/
Download almost any textbook as e-copy https://libgen.is/
Online image editor with similar features to Photoshop https://www.photopea.com/
Terms of Service, Didn’t Read summarizes terms of service and rates them for privacy. https://tosdr.org/
A digital archive of the World Wide Web. Get snapshots of how the web looked in the past https://archive.org/web/
Combines all the softwares you want into a single package that you can easily install http://ninite.com/
item.dc:creator: Farrahfowler

hey remember when I streamed? I do.

mood
pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat pat

These Isopod hours are real
0w0

item.description: Or just "media consumption station" for those arguing it doesn't fit the traditional description of social media. You don't need to earn followers to have fun and get interactions. I think that's really important. Anyone can be anonymously relevant here, don't ever change that. (originally posted by @etherealfaeriemonster on 2022-12-06 07:06:00)

Wanting too# clear space on my phone
Its overload

Thats too much space
Works

Carl!!!
Ah cmon
It said
That
Eeh
You can do it
Oh

She does it every year

No adds
Adds suck

Yeah thats me recording wildlife indoors from a screen,,badasss

No add
Lol

Adds

Le non!

There it iz

Waht

Give it up
Eeh hee
Bigman
Oef

item.dc:creator: Para4

item.title: So many people have an impact on your life. So many different people bring you joy. Treasure them.
item.description: I have a few people like this in my life. A security guard from my high school. A janitor from my grade school. An usher from my church who always sits my mom and myself. A server at my go to diner. Little acts of kindness go a long way, that is what I try to teach my son.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice
